declarations.name: EmbDataTable

members.name: caption
members.description: Caption rendered above the table when provided.

members.name: columns
members.description: Column definitions assigned as a property from JavaScript.

members.name: emptyMessage
members.description: Message shown when no visible rows remain after filtering or loading completes.

members.name: loading
members.description: Shows the loading state instead of row data.

members.name: pageSize
members.description: Maximum number of rows shown per page. Set to 0 to disable pagination.

members.name: rows
members.description: Row data assigned as a property from JavaScript.

members.name: searchable
members.description: Enables the built-in search toolbar and filtering behavior.

members.name: searchLabel
members.description: Accessible label applied to the internal search control.

members.name: searchPlaceholder
members.description: Placeholder text shown in the internal search control.

members.name: searchQuery
members.description: Current search query used to filter visible rows.

members.name: sortDirection
members.description: Active sort direction for the current sort key.

members.name: sortKey
members.description: Column key currently used for sorting.

events.name: sort-change
events.description: Fired when the active sort column or direction changes.

events.name: page-change
events.description: Fired when the current page changes through pagination.
Fired when the search query changes and the matching row count updates.
events.name: search-change

attributes.name: caption
attributes.description: Caption rendered above the table when provided.

attributes.name: empty-message
attributes.description: Message shown when no visible rows remain after filtering or loading completes.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Shows the loading state instead of row data.

attributes.name: page-size
attributes.description: Maximum number of rows shown per page. Set to 0 to disable pagination.

attributes.name: searchable
attributes.description: Enables the built-in search toolbar and filtering behavior.

attributes.name: search-label
attributes.description: Accessible label applied to the internal search control.

attributes.name: search-placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown in the internal search control.

attributes.name: search-query
attributes.description: Current search query used to filter visible rows.

attributes.name: sort-direction
attributes.description: Active sort direction for the current sort key.

attributes.name: sort-key
attributes.description: Column key currently used for sorting.

declarations.summary: Searchable, sortable data table for application records.

declarations.name: meta
declarations.default: { title: "Components/Tabs", args: { activityLabel: "Activity", activityText: "Activity content", overviewLabel: "Overview", overviewText: "Overview content", settingsLabel: "Settings", settingsText: "Settings content", value: "overview" }, argTypes: { value: { control: { type: "radio" }, options: ["overview", "activity", "settings"] } }, render: ({ activityLabel, activityText, overviewLabel, overviewText, settingsLabel, settingsText, value }: TabsStoryArgs) => { const element = document.createElement("emb-tabs") as EmbTabs; element.value = value; element.addEventListener("change", (event) => { event.stopPropagation(); }); const panels = [ { label: overviewLabel, text: overviewText, value: "overview" }, { label: activityLabel, text: activityText, value: "activity" }, { label: settingsLabel, text: settingsText, value: "settings" } ]; for (const panel of panels) { const section = document.createElement("section"); section.dataset.label = panel.label; section.dataset.value = panel.value; section.textContent = panel.text; element.append(section); } return element; } }
